style_effects: Molten lava cracks glow crimson beneath Psyduck's paws, emitting intense heat shimmer that warps the air in rippling waves. Ember sparks float upward in chaotic bursts, crackling with orange and gold energy, while a jagged crimson aura pulses around its body, casting flickering amber light that illuminates smoke trails from its movements. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
